description:
## Goal

The `fetcher` shard is pinned to `3a038c66085e1926ecc715df2275f50a4e7be36d`.
The upstream `kritoke/fetcher.cr` is at `283326b` with 13 new
commits, including:
- DNS cache extraction (better SSRF/memory profile)
- Reddit OAuth (bypass datacenter IP blocks)
- Various SSRF and thread-safety fixes
- Code-quality refactors

Update to the latest.

## Why

- The P0 memory investigation (quickhea-alz) is ongoing; the
  DNS cache extraction in the upstream is a candidate for
  improving the memory profile.
- We are 13 commits behind on security fixes (SSRF, IPv6
  detection) and stability improvements (semaphore race,
  fiber error handling).

## How

\`\`\`
nix develop . --command shards update fetcher
\`\`\`

This will:
1. Fetch the latest commit from `kritoke/fetcher.cr`
2. Update `shard.lock` and `lib/fetcher/` vendored copy
3. Re-resolve the transitive dependency graph

## Acceptance

- `shard.yml` and `shard.lock` point to the new commit
- `lib/fetcher/` is updated
- `just nix-build` succeeds
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` still passes (231+ examples)
- `nix develop . --command ameba` clean
- Boot smoke test: server starts, refresh cycle runs, feeds are fetched without error
title: Update fetcher.cr to latest upstream commit
